title: Large command output prune
use_case: Prune a completed validation/build segment where the important retained information is the pass/fail outcome rather than the full command output.

entries.text:
You are an Adversarial Code Reviewer.

Read first:
1) /home/basil/projects/opencode_context_management/opencode/.llm-conductor/REVIEWER_SUBAGENTS.md
2) /home/basil/projects/opencode_context_management/opencode/.agents/plans/epic-basil-minimal-rebase/story-basil-minimal-rebase.2-replay-required-runtime-changes-on-fresh-upstream-base.md
3) /home/basil/projects/opencode_context_management/opencode/.opencode/context_bonsai/basil-rebase-commit-scope.md

Story: 1.2 Replay required runtime changes on fresh upstream base

Commits to review (replay worktree):
- 68b8a458ddf1124d97a1ba5c1768043805ed8eeb
- 197aec33681c0390ea9f8b2ba5e89cb8181c6f84
- 6489e5a5ab913e1deeb4a7065f93a3c8668161b4
- 0583c23392d1c1b15124dcc7d3a5d003cf406ec2

Review requirements:
- Verify only required runtime items were replayed in deterministic order
- Verify mapping/method evidence in `.opencode/context_bonsai/basil-rebase-runtime-execution-notes.md`
- Validate acceptance criteria for Story 1.2
- Identify genuine issues only with severity and evidence

Return:
- Verdict PASS/FAIL
- Findings (or none)
- AC mapping
- Follow-up guidance for judge

input.from_pattern: Run targeted opencode replay validation tests
input.to_pattern: Count lines in truncated build log file
input.reason: Large command output retained only as pass/fail evidence
input.summary: Executed replay validation commands in the replay worktree: targeted tests passed (28/28), typecheck completed without errors, and turbo build succeeded. Build output was large and truncated, so line count was captured for targeted tail inspection.

entries.output:
Archived 2 messages from pattern "Run targeted opencode replay validation tests" (resolved to msg_d2bed02c2001cvLivq6rfxwSr6) to pattern "Count lines in truncated build log file" (resolved to msg_d2bedaa9d00141qJxfq1i4oIOz).
Summary: Executed replay validation commands in the replay worktree: targeted tests passed (28/28), typecheck completed without errors, and turbo build succeeded. Build output was large and truncated, so line count was captured for targeted tail inspection.
Index terms: story-1.2, replay-worktree, bun test, typecheck, turbo build, validation
